description_long: This is a two-story suburban house surrounded by a dense perimeter of evergreen trees, forming a triangular lot. The house features a gray gable roof, light brown brick or wood siding, and a prominent front entryway with a covered porch and columns. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, and a driveway leads to an attached garage on the right side. The landscaping is well-maintained, with the trees providing privacy and a natural barrier around the property. The overall design suggests a comfortable, family-oriented residence with classic suburban architectural elements.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gray gable roof, light brown siding, and a covered front porch, surrounded by dense evergreen trees and a driveway leading to an attached garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical windows, covered porch, and the triangular arrangement of evergreen trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the driveway, the garage entrance, and the dense tree barrier along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, rear windows, and the continuous tree enclosure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway curve, side windows, and the triangular lot defined by the trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with columns, central door, and steps leading up from the walkway
